Groundbreaking Ceremony of Ramazan Bülbül Guest House Has Been Held

29.04.2024

The groundbreaking ceremony of Ibn Haldun University Ramazan Bülbül Guest House, located in the center of Başakşehir, witnessed an intense participation.

Our university is adding a new one to the services and physical infrastructure it offers to its members. In this context, the groundbreaking ceremony of Ramazan Bülbül Guest House, which will be put into service in the center of Başakşehir, was held with an intense participation.

On April 29th, Monday, our Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz, Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan, Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan, members of the Board of Trustees and guests, as well as RAMS Turkey Chairman Devran Bülbül and company officials who undertook the construction of the Guest House attended the ceremony.

After the speeches made at the ceremony, the foundation of Ibn Haldun University Ramazan Bülbül Guest House was laid with prayers.

About Ibn Haldun University Ramazan Bülbül Guest House

Ramazan Bülbül Guest House, whose construction has started at a location within walking distance of Başakşehir Metrokent metro station, will serve the academics and researchers of our University. The project, which will contribute to making our university a center of attraction and will include more than 50 different types of rooms as well as social facilities, is expected to be completed soon.
